reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar xa cargar combustible en el Río con rapidez y calidad,  sobre todo los días de semana.
Fines de semana con paciencia pero siempre bien atendido.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to refuel on the river, quickly and efficiently, especially on weekdays. Weekends are a bit slow, but the service is always good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1cU1TREJREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena.
Ojo que a veces no tienen combustible y muchas veces cuando cargas te dicen que no les funciona el sistema para carga de puntos servíclub

(Translated by Google)
The service is good. Be aware that they sometimes run out of fuel, and often when you fill up they tell you their Serviclub points system isn't working.

reviews.comment:
Sobre el rio lujan enfrente al ACA. Amplio muelle con varios picos de surtidor para llenar tanques y seguir navegando. Tienen tarjetas de crédito 💳 y de débito.  Lugar imprescindible ya que hay muchos lugares para repostar combustible en el delta. Atienden horario corrido.

(Translated by Google)
On the Luján River, across from the ACA. A spacious dock with several pumps to fill up your tanks and continue cruising. They accept credit and debit cards. This is a must-visit location, as there are many places to refuel in the delta. They are open 24/7.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKc2ZYUnh3RRAB
